name: spinner
description: An animated SVG ring (background circle + foreground arc) that signals an indeterminate background operation. Two variants (default/primary), three sizes (sm/md/lg), role=status + aria-live for AT, animate-spin + motion-reduce:animate-none for reduced-motion. Zero JS, CSP-clean, inline-context safe (<span> root).
docs: Copies the spinner partial to your JTE root at lievit/spinner.jte, reached as @template.lievit.spinner(size=..., variant=..., label=...). The root is a <span role=status> so it composes safely inside inline or flex contexts. The source is yours: edit freely.
